Disposition rules
-----------------
Core raw data enter through the source-data import task.
Derived datasets and cloud graphs are rebuilt in production tasks.
Exact generated legacy artifacts are preserved by tasks/reproduce_legacy_outputs for parity checks and reference.
Old drafts, exploratory notebooks, and one-off code remain archived until a named task needs them.
